news.summary: U.S. stocks experienced mixed trading midway through the session, with the Nasdaq Composite gaining around 50 points, up 0.24% to 19,663.38. The Dow Jones fell by 0.03% to 42,852.84, and the S&P 500 rose by 0.26% to 6,038.05. Information technology shares surged by 0.9%, while industrials stocks dropped by 0.5%. Oracle Corp. shares soared by over 13% after reporting fourth-quarter revenue of $15.9 billion, surpassing estimates of $15.58 billion, and adjusted earnings of $1.70 per share, higher than estimates of $1.64 per share. TELUS International (Cda) Inc. saw its shares rise by 24% to $3.6650 after announcing a proposed development. Check out Benzinga.com for the complete article.
news.headline: Nasdaq up 50 points, Oracle shares surge 13% post Q4 results, revenue $15.9B vs. $15.58B est., earnings $1.70 EPS vs. $1.64.

news.summary: SignalFire is leading a new round of funding to support the rapidly growing enterprise interest in Customer Trust Automation solutions. The funding will further boost the success of Sue, an AI Agent for automating B2B security reviews, and accelerate the development of Phil, the first AI Agent for automating RFP processes. This news comes from San Francisco and highlights the increasing demand for these innovative solutions in the market.
news.headline: Conveyor secures $20M Series B funding to advance AI solutions for security reviews and RFPs, led by SignalFire.

news.summary: A whiskey distillery known as Leiper’s Fork, which is owned and operated by a family, is currently based in Williamson County. They have plans to expand their operations to Nashville Yards.
news.headline: Leiper’s Fork Distillery, based in Williamson County, expands to Nashville Yards.

news.summary: A new podcast is now available for business owners, not limited to auto professionals. On June 12, 2025, "Master Tech to Millionaire: In the Trenches with the Wrenches" was introduced by Joe Adams, the CEO of Adams Automotive and a national trainer at AutoShop. This podcast promises to provide valuable insights that can benefit all entrepreneurs.
news.headline: New podcast "Master Tech to Millionaire" by Joe Adams launches, targeting business owners beyond auto pros. Presented by Adams Automotive.

news.summary: A recent study showed that the drug Revumenib was found to be well-tolerated when combined with venetoclax/azacitidine in older patients with newly diagnosed mNPM1 and KMT2Ar AML. This combination therapy resulted in favorable tolerability outcomes in this patient group. The findings suggest that this treatment regimen could be a promising option for individuals with these specific types of acute myeloid leukemia.
news.headline: Syndax announces publication of Revumenib data from BEAT AML trial, presented at EHA 2025. Well-tolerated in older mNPM1, KMT2Ar AML patients.

news.summary: In New York on June 3rd, the 16th French-American Entrepreneurship Award showcased three startups at the French Consulate. The event highlighted innovative French founders leveraging AI in Connected TV, Construction, and Insurance, aimed at expanding their solutions in the US market. The 1st Prize was awarded to Olyzon, a company revolutionizing Connected TV advertising through an AI-based platform that enhances scale, transparency, and performance in media buying.
news.headline: French-American Entrepreneurship Award 2025 spotlights AI-driven innovation with 3 startups revolutionizing Connected TV, Construction, and Insurance sectors. Olyzon wins 1st Prize for AI-powered platform transforming TV advertising.

news.summary: Two crypto analysts, Benjamin Cowen and DonAlt, have conflicting views on the future of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) after recent price movements. Cowen is bearish, citing the 200-week simple moving average (SMA) crossing above Bitcoin's previous all-time high as a historical indicator of a cycle top. Despite the current 200-week SMA being around $48,715, significantly below the $69,000 all-time high, Cowen warns that past trends suggest a cycle top may still be imminent. On the other hand, DonAlt is optimistic about continued upside potential for Bitcoin. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bitcoin is at $107,000 with analysts divided on its future. One predicts a cycle top while the other sees continued growth.

news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, MAXIOM, a leading health and performance AI platform, revealed its groundbreaking corporate wellness solution, raising the bar for enhancing employee well-being. This innovative program aims to replace traditional, costly, and generic wellness initiatives by offering a more cost-effective, efficient, and user-friendly alternative. Leveraging insights from billions of data sets, MAXIOM's solution promises to redefine corporate wellness programs.
news.headline: MAXIOM launches AI-driven corporate wellness solution, setting new standard for employee health. Built on billions of data sets.

news.summary: At the Cisco Live event in San Diego, Quantum Xchange revealed the availability of its Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) key management solution, Phio TX®, in a virtual container form named Phio TX-EM. This new format is designed to work seamlessly with Cisco networking operating systems such as IOS XE, IOS XR, and Nexus NX-OS. It enables users to strengthen their infrastructure and smoothly transition to NIST-standard PQC. This announcement signifies a significant advancement for Cisco networking users as they can now access Phio TX® in a more versatile and user-friendly manner.
news.headline: Quantum Xchange releases Phio TX-EM, a virtual container PQC key management solution compatible with Cisco systems at Cisco Live.

news.summary: In Katy, Texas, Igloo debuts its 'The Cooler Brand' worldwide campaign, showcasing a vibrant mix of cultures that shape the diverse world of Igloo. The campaign, found at TheCoolerBrand.com, highlights a range of characters and scenes, promoting unity and enjoyment across all ages and backgrounds. Igloo aims to connect with a broad audience as the campaign invites everyone to join in the fun.
news.headline: Igloo launches 'The Cooler Brand' campaign celebrating diversity and fun with global influences. Visit TheCoolerBrand.com for more.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Natixis Corporate & Investment Banking provided a floating-rate financing of $158.2 million to a global investment firm's affiliate. The funding was used to refinance 1 Queens Plaza South Tower, a high-quality multifamily property with 391 units in Long Island City.
news.headline: Natixis CIB lends $158.2M to refinance Long Island City multifamily property for global investment firm.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, an inventor from Oklahoma City, Okla., shared the inspiration behind SHEIKA'S GOURMET CARROT PIE, aiming to revolutionize the enjoyment of traditional carrot cake flavors at home. This innovative recipe promises a high-quality pie that mirrors restaurant standards, designed for convenient home preparation.
news.headline: Inventor creates Sheika's Gourmet Carrot Pie as a spin on carrot cake, promises restaurant-quality dessert.

news.summary: In Dallas on June 12, 2025, the American Pecan Promotion Board launched the "Surprisingly Snackable Pecans" campaign in response to an uptick in snack consumption among Americans. The campaign looks to target a growing number of daily snacking occasions by incorporating humor, strategic placement, and engaging content. This initiative seeks to capitalize on the trend of increased snacking frequency and boost the presence of pecans in the snacking market.
news.headline: American Pecan Promotion Board launches "Surprisingly Snackable Pecans" campaign to boost share in snacking market.

news.summary: Southern regions, particularly in Tennessee and Virginia, are displaying significant economic strength. The challenge of home affordability is pervasive across most areas, while rates of foreclosures, mortgage health, and unemployment show substantial variation. This information comes from ATTOM, a prominent curator, with data showing these trends.
news.headline: California and New Jersey top housing market headwinds; Southern counties in Tennessee, Virginia show strength; varying foreclosures, affordability issues.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Singapore, Specialised Therapeutics (ST), an independent biopharmaceutical company, announced the extension of its current supply and distribution contract with Incyte Biosciences International Sàrl, a Swiss-based affiliate of Incyte. This agreement signifies a strategic move in the business dealings between the two entities and is expected to impact the distribution of pharmaceutical products in the market. The extension of the agreement reflects the positive outcomes and mutual benefits derived from the partnership.
news.headline: Specialised Therapeutics partners with Incyte for two new therapies, expanding agreement. Singapore, June 12, 2025.

news.summary: In McLean, Virginia on June 12, 2025, Freddie Mac announced the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ). The report revealed that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.84%.
news.headline: Freddie Mac report shows 30-year fixed-rate mortgage at 6.84%, remaining flat.

news.summary: Aptose disclosed safety, response, and MRD clinical findings from the TUSCANY Phase 1/2 trial of Tuspetinib triplet therapy for newly diagnosed AML. The data presented at the conference highlighted promising results, with a significant number of patients showing positive responses to the treatment. This trial specifically focused on patients with newly diagnosed AML, an aggressive form of leukemia, and demonstrated encouraging outcomes in terms of safety and efficacy. The MRD data further reinforced the potential of Tuspetinib triplet therapy in treating this challenging disease.
news.headline: Aptose reports data from TUSCANY trial on Tuspetinib triplet therapy for AML at EHA Congress 2025.

news.summary: In Amsterdam on June 12, 2025, Aegon Ltd.'s Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGM) successfully passed all resolutions. This encompassed the endorsement of the final dividend for 2024, totaling EUR 0.19 per common share, resulting in Aegon’s overall dividend for 2024 standing at EUR 0.35 per common share. Additionally, the assembly gave the green light to all suggested nominations to the Board of Directors. This involved the reinstatement of three current members and the selection of three new members.
news.headline: Aegon's AGM approves all resolutions, EUR 0.19 final dividend per common share for 2024, total dividend of EUR 0.35 per share. New Board members elected.
